title: Private nuisance
summary: 9084 Tort — unreasonable interference with land use, balancing interests.
learningObjectives: Define private nuisance and protected interests.
Analyse who may sue and be sued.
Apply cases: Miller v Jackson, Coventry v Lawrence.

simpleExplanation.title: When neighbours go too far
simpleExplanation.summary: Private nuisance protects enjoyment of land from unreasonable interference — courts balance severity, duration, and locality.
steps: Claimant — must have interest in land.

sections.content: **Private nuisance** (4.2.2) — **balancing exercise** is central to evaluation.
